intro.name: Lucas Pereira.
intro.description: Full-stack developer committed to delivering quality solutions focused on what really matters for the project.

about.title: About me
about.p1: Hi, I'm Lucas Pereira, and my passion is development. I have a degree in Systems Analysis and Development, and since the beginning of my programming journey, I've been driven by a constant desire to learn and evolve. I fully embraced Full-Stack development, honing my skills in both user interface creation and Back-End system development and optimization.
about.p2: Currently, I work as a Full-Stack Developer, working on projects that require a complete approach, from creating fluid user experiences to implementing efficient and scalable system logic. I'm always looking to explore new technologies, improve my problem-solving ability, and develop innovative solutions that make an impact.

capi.name: Capí
capi.description: An artificial intelligence designed to process, interpret, and analyze data about climate change based on scientific reports and studies, providing precise insights to combat misinformation.

ignite.name: Ignite Lab-React
ignite.description: Application developed during Rocketseat's Ignite Lab event. Its main functionality is to present and structure the lessons shared by the platform's teachers for students.

matanativa.name: Mata Nativa
matanativa.description: A digital experimentation laboratory dedicated to impactful sponsored content, combining engaging narratives, design, and data science to communicate scientific stories and drive positive change for Brazilian biomes.

pokesearch.name: PokeSearch V2
pokesearch.description: The application is the second version of the PokeSearch project, where the goal is for users to access all existing Pokémon, information about each one, and the most diverse information about Pokémon.

bougie.description: Creation and improvement of various features to enhance the overall user experience and bring the best of the brand and the best visual appearance to their store.
